en: He made an altar of bronze, twenty cubits long and twenty cubits wide and ten cubits high.
zh: 他又做了一座銅壇，長九公尺，寬九公尺，高四公尺半。

en: Then he made the sea of cast metal. It was round, ten cubits from brim to brim, and five cubits high, and a line of thirty cubits measured its circumference.
zh: 又鑄造了一個銅海，直徑有四公尺半，是圓形的，高兩公尺兩公寸，圓周有十三公尺兩公寸。

en: Under it were figures of gourds, for ten cubits, compassing the sea all around. The gourds were in two rows, cast with it when it was cast.
zh: 銅海底下四周有形狀像牛的裝飾物；每四十五公分十個，共分二行，是和銅海一體鑄成的。

en: It stood on twelve oxen, three facing north, three facing west, three facing south, and three facing east. The sea was set on them, and all their rear parts were inward.
zh: 有十二頭銅牛馱著銅海：三頭向北，三頭向西，三頭向南，三頭向東。銅海在牛背上面，牛尾部向內。

en: Its thickness was a handbreadth. And its brim was made like the brim of a cup, like the flower of a lily. It held 3,000 baths.
zh: 銅海厚七公分半，邊緣像杯邊的做法，形狀似百合花，容量有六萬公升。

en: He also made ten basins in which to wash, and set five on the south side, and five on the north side. In these they were to rinse off what was used for the burnt offering, and the sea was for the priests to wash in.
zh: 他又做了十個洗濯盆：五個放在銅海的右邊，五個放在左邊，用來清洗東西；獻燔祭所用的東西要在盆內清洗，但銅海是給祭司洗濯的。

en: And he made ten golden lampstands as prescribed, and set them in the temple, five on the south side and five on the north.
zh: 又照著規定的樣式做了十個金燈臺，放在殿內；五個在右邊，五個在左邊。

en: He also made ten tables and placed them in the temple, five on the south side and five on the north. And he made a hundred basins of gold.
zh: 又做了十張桌子，安放在殿內；五張在右邊，五張在左邊。又做了一百個金碗。

en: He made the court of the priests and the great court and doors for the court and overlaid their doors with bronze.
zh: 又建造祭司院、大院和大院的門；門都包上銅。

en: And he set the sea at the southeast corner of the house.
zh: 又把銅海放在殿的右邊，就是東南方。

en: Hiram also made the pots, the shovels, and the basins. So Hiram finished the work that he did for King Solomon on the house of God:
zh: 戶蘭又做了鍋、鏟和碗。這樣，戶蘭為所羅門王完成了神殿的工程，

en: the two pillars, the bowls, and the two capitals on the top of the pillars; and the two latticeworks to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the top of the pillars;
zh: 就是兩根柱子和在柱子上面兩個碗形柱頂，以及兩個網子，遮蓋柱子上面兩個碗形的柱頂，

en: and the 400 pomegranates for the two latticeworks, two rows of pomegranates for each latticework, to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the pillars.
zh: 又有四百個石榴，安放在兩個網子上，每個網子有兩行石榴，遮蓋柱子上頭兩個碗形的柱頂。

en: He made the stands also, and the basins on the stands,
zh: 又做了十個盆座和盆座上的十個洗濯盆，

en: and the one sea, and the twelve oxen underneath it.
zh: 還有一個銅海和銅海底下的十二頭銅牛。

en: The pots, the shovels, the forks, and all the equipment for these, Huram-abi made of burnished bronze for King Solomon for the house of the LORD.
zh: 鍋、鏟、肉叉和一切相關的器皿，都是戶蘭用磨光的銅給所羅門王，為耶和華的殿所做的。

en: In the plain of the Jordan the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zeredah.
zh: 是王在約旦平原，在疏割和撒利但之間，用膠泥模鑄成的。

en: Solomon made all these things in great quantities, for the weight of the bronze was not sought.
zh: 所羅門所做的這一切器皿，數量很多；銅的重量無法估計。

en: So Solomon made all the vessels that were in the house of God: the golden altar, the tables for the bread of the Presence,
zh: 所羅門又做了神殿裡的一切器具，就是金壇和放陳設餅的桌子，

en: the lampstands and their lamps of pure gold to burn before the inner sanctuary, as prescribed;
zh: 用純金做的燈臺和燈盞，按定例在內殿門前燃點，

en: the flowers, the lamps, and the tongs, of purest gold;
zh: 還有燈花、燈盞和燭剪，都是精金做的。

en: the snuffers, basins, dishes for incense, and fire pans, of pure gold, and the sockets of the temple, for the inner doors to the Most Holy Place and for the doors of the nave of the temple were of gold.
zh: 又有剪刀、盤子、調羹和火鼎，都是用精金做的。殿門，就是進入至聖所裡面的門和正殿的門，都是金的。
